name: capability-mesh
description: Design an interconnected set of specialist skills that communicate via explicit handoffs and verification gates.

steps.text: Start with a capability mesh brief. Each skill remains useful on its own and also participates in a larger workflow.

steps.goal: Using skill capability-mesh, propose a small interconnected capability network for a privacy-aware agent workflow. Include at least four skills, a handoff contract for each step, and a verification gate. Keep the plan modular and reusable.
criteria: Each skill has a standalone trigger
Each handoff includes input/output and next skill
Artifact paths or durable notes are specified
